evidence.metric: rank threshold / min votes / selected rows
adaptive delta vs gap8 PSNR / LPIPS
positive extension gap8 PSNR / LPIPS / payload
false-positive controls gap8 PSNR / LPIPS / payload

limitations.impact: Current rate is sampled/proxy and rendered evidence is medium sampled validation.
limitations.required_followup: Run broader or full-sequence RD with all keyframe, metadata, and residual payload counted.

limitations.impact: Some promoted targets are not hard/high-payload labels and may waste extra keyframes.
limitations.required_followup: Broader validation should quantify false-positive keyframe overhead; selector refinement may add per-sequence budgets or stricter gates.

limitations.impact: Hard rows missed by the selector remain essentially uniform-gap8 residual cases.
limitations.required_followup: Keep false-negative stress sets in broader validation and consider selector features that improve recall without large false-positive cost.

limitations.impact: Promoted rows cannot be compared by middle-render PSNR/LPIPS; they are transmitted keyframes.
limitations.required_followup: Judge promoted rows through keyframe rate, all-frame sequence metrics, and subjective keyframe continuity.

limitations.impact: DAVIS experiments use offline input RGB; online streaming variants need declared lookahead.
limitations.required_followup: Document lookahead or restrict selector features for online settings.

next_steps.goal: Scale beyond the 50-target medium protocol before final claims.
next_steps.requirements: Reuse existing rows where possible; include false negatives, false-positive keyframes, high-payload controls, normal controls, and weak subjective sequences.

next_steps.goal: Convert sampled proxy rate into full sequence/frame accounting.
next_steps.requirements: Count all keyframe anchors, adaptive schedule metadata, Stage158 residual payloads for every non-keyframe recovery, and report MiB/frame.
Report all-frame, keyframe-only, middle-only, per-sequence, and per-category PSNR/SSIM/MS-SSIM/LPIPS.

next_steps.goal: Reduce false-positive keyframes or false negatives if broader validation shows rate/quality issues.
next_steps.requirements: Stay within Stage162-allowed encoder-side RGB/motion features; no rendered quality or target dense anchors as inference inputs.
